ministry: Ministry of Digital Security & Cyber Defense

frameworks.title: Aetheria Cybersecurity Framework
frameworks.owner: Ministry of Digital Security & Cyber Defense
frameworks.summary: Comprehensive cybersecurity framework covering threat assessment, defense protocols, and incident response for all Aetheria infrastructure.

frameworks.title: Critical Infrastructure Protection Standard
frameworks.owner: Ministry of Digital Security & Cyber Defense
frameworks.summary: Security standards for node operators, consensus mechanisms, and critical digital infrastructure components.

frameworks.title: Threat Intelligence Sharing Protocol
frameworks.owner: Ministry of Digital Security & Cyber Defense
frameworks.summary: Structured protocol for sharing threat intelligence between ministries, node operators, and international partners.

incidents.title: CVE-2026-XXXX Consensus Layer Vulnerability
incidents.summary: Security vulnerability in consensus layer requiring emergency patch deployment across all active nodes. Successfully mitigated within 72 hours.

incidents.title: Distributed Denial of Service Attack on Registry
incidents.summary: Coordinated DDoS attempt on citizen registry infrastructure. Mitigated through traffic filtering and redundant gateway activation.

incidents.title: Social Engineering Campaign Targeting Node Operators
incidents.summary: Coordinated phishing campaign targeting node operators with fake security update notifications. Investigation ongoing.

protocols.title: Incident Response Playbook
protocols.owner: Ministry of Digital Security & Cyber Defense
protocols.summary: Standardized incident response procedures including containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons-learned phases.

protocols.title: Digital Defense Posture Management
protocols.owner: Ministry of Digital Security & Cyber Defense
protocols.summary: Continuous monitoring and adjustment of defensive posture including firewall rules, access controls, and anomaly detection.

protocols.title: Supply Chain Security Framework
protocols.owner: Ministry of Digital Security & Cyber Defense
protocols.summary: Framework for securing software supply chain including dependency verification, build integrity, and distribution channel protection.
